Hours & Location
Discover
Our Story

Where Legends
Are Made

Nestled in the heart of San Diego, Excalibur Cigar & Scotch Lounge is more than a place to smoke — it's a sanctuary. A family-owned establishment where every guest is welcomed like a regular and every visit becomes a memory.

We are California's only official Montecristo Cigar Lounge, home to over 15,000 premium cigars from around the world, a wall of rare Scotch and spirits, and a full bar stocked with craft beers and fine wines.

15K+
Premium Cigars
4.7★
Google Rating
13
Televisions
#1
In San Diego
🥃
World-Class Spirits
An unrivaled selection of Scotch, Bourbon, Whiskey, and Wine. Our staff pairs the perfect dram to complement your cigar.
🌿
Premium Humidor
California's only Montecristo Lounge. Our walk-in humidor holds thousands of premium cigars, from everyday smokes to rare limited editions.
🛋️
Luxurious Atmosphere
Rich leather seating, warm brick walls, and 13 screens for sports. Indoor and outdoor seating available.
🎉
Private Events
Our private backroom accommodates groups for special gatherings, corporate events, and celebratory evenings.
What Guests Say

Trusted by Thousands

Google Rating
★★★★★

"My Cigar Lounge Home! Nice people, excellent selection of cigars and beverages. They know their cigars and recommend perfect drink matches. If you're in SD, don't miss Excalibur."

B
Bernhard W.
Google Review
★★★★★

"Great cigar selection and an unbelievable whiskey and scotch selection. Great crowd and friendly attentive service. A must-see place for cigar and whiskey lovers."

R
Robert M.
TripAdvisor
★★★★★

"The cigar selection is beyond anything I've seen in San Diego, and the liquor selection is top notch. Nothing beats a good Scotch and a cigar on a Friday night. The staff are the best!"

D
David K.
Yelp Review
★★★★★

"Comfy leather couches, great air flow so smoke doesn't linger. Very low-key with incredibly friendly staff. Mama Excalibur even walked around with homemade chocolate covered strawberries!"

S
Sarah L.
Google Review
★★★★★

"Probably the best selection of cigars in San Diego, great beer and scotch selection and hospitality is second to none. Family owned and operated — very personable experience."

N
Nathaniel G.
Roadtrippers
★★★★★

"Great selection of cigars and whiskeys, plenty of seats. You can see fighter jets through the front of the lounge. Massive wall of scotch to choose from. An absolute gem."
